parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
actor Administrative
participant ":AddScooterUI" as UI
participant ":AddScooterController" as Controller
participant ":Pharmacy" as Pharmacy
participant "ls:ListScooters" as ListScooters
participant "sc:Scooter" as Scooter
participant "bat:Battery" as Battery
participant "scdb:ScooterDB" as ScooterDB
participant "batdb:BatteryDB" as BatteryDB

activate Administrative
Administrative -> UI : 1 begins the process of adding a scooter
activate UI
UI --> Administrative : 2 asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
Administrative -> UI : 3 inserts the solicited data
UI -> Controller : 4 newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate Controller
Controller -> Pharmacy : 5 ls = getListScooters()
activate Pharmacy
Pharmacy --> Controller
deactivate Pharmacy
Controller -> ListScooters : 6 sc=newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate ListScooters
ListScooters -> Scooter ** : 7 create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate Scooter
Scooter -> Battery ** : 8 create(id_Battery, capacity)
activate Battery
Battery --> Battery : 9 validateBattery(bat)
deactivate Battery
deactivate Scooter
deactivate ListScooters
Controller -> ListScooters : 10 validateScooter(sc)
activate ListScooters
ListScooters --> Controller
deactivate ListScooters
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> Administrative : 11 validates the data, presents it and asks the administrator for its confirmation
Administrative -> UI : 12 confirms
UI -> Controller : 13 registerScooter()
activate Controller
Controller -> ListScooters : 14 registerScooter(sc)
activate ListScooters
ListScooters -> ListScooters : 15 validateScooter(sc)
ListScooters -> ListScooters : 16 addScooter(sc)
ListScooters --> Scooter : 17 save(sc)
activate Scooter
Scooter --> ScooterDB : 18 save(sc)
activate ScooterDB
deactivate ScooterDB
Scooter --> BatteryDB : 19 save(bat)
activate BatteryDB
deactivate BatteryDB
deactivate Scooter
ListScooters --> Controller
deactivate ListScooters
Controller --> UI
deactivate Controller
UI --> Administrative : 20 adds the scooter to a list of scooters
deactivate UI
deactivate Administrative
@enduml
```
